mapper.sql: id, khno, name, area, cus_manager, level, xyd, address, post_code, phone, fax, website, yyzz, fr, zczj, nyye, khyh, khzh, dswj, gswj, is_valid, create_date, update_date
mapper.select:
select from t_customer
is_valid = 1
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and khno like concat('%', #{khno}, '%')
and level = #{level}
mapper.delete: update t_customer set is_valid = 0 where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_customer set is_valid = 0 where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_customer
id, khno, name, area, cus_manager, level, xyd, address, post_code, phone, fax, website, yyzz, fr, zczj, nyye, khyh, khzh, dswj, gswj, is_valid, create_date, update_date,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{khno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{area,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cusManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{xyd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yyzz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zczj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nyye,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{khyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{khzh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dswj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gswj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_customer c WHERE c.is_valid = 1 AND c.khno NOT IN (SELECT cus_no FROM t_customer_loss WHERE is_valid = 1) AND ( (SELECT MAX(order_date) FROM t_customer_order o WHERE o.cus_id = c.id AND o.is_valid = 1) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) OR ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_customer_order o WHERE o.cus_id = c.id AND o.is_valid = 1) AND c.create_date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) ) )
